When in opposition, Labour pledged to make misogyny a hate crime. Now they’re in power, they have gone silent and… Read More Make Misogyny a Hate Crime Wera in action Crack Down on Covert Filming Women are being secretly filmed on nights out – often from low, suggestive angles when they are wearing skirts – with these videos then uploaded online, where they attract large volumes of misogynistic abuse and degrading comments. Videos of this… Read More Crack Down on Covert Filming Wera in action Energy Security Means Investing in Renewables Trump’s war on Iran has sent global oil and gas prices spiralling, hitting already struggling households and businesses hard. It has clearly exposed the absurdity of backing fossil fuels over renewables. Our reliance on oil and gas is risking our… Read More Energy Security Means Investing in Renewables Wera in action Stopping Social Media Drug Sales Children are buying vapes laced with the dangerous drug spice through social media platforms. I have been campaigning for tech companies to be held accountable and made to put an end to this online drug dealing. In Parliament, I argued… Read More Stopping Social Media Drug Sales Wera in action Challenging China’s Aggression In Parliament I pushed for the government to sanction those responsible for targeting pro- democracy Hong Kong campaigners living in the UK. Hong Kong authorities have issued bounties of HK$1 million (around £100,000) for information leading to the arrest of… Read More Challenging China’s Aggression Wera in action Preventing Eating Disorder Deaths Far too many lives are being lost to eating disorders. These could, and should have been avoided with better early intervention and proper care. The true scale of this crisis remains hidden with eating disorder related deaths often mis-recorded or… Read More Preventing Eating Disorder Deaths Wera in action Bath’s New SEND School In Parliament, I called on the Government to urgently release the frozen funding for Bath’s new special school. Parents of children with special educational needs are crying out for special school places across Bath. Funding to build a brand new… Read More Bath’s New SEND School Wera in action Tackling Online Abuse Against Women Technology and social media platforms are enabling new avenues to harass and abuse women online. In Parliament I urged action to fight this. New technology and online platforms are increasingly being used to harm, abuse, and harass women.
